_metadata.use_case:
I need help designing a schema for analyzing public comments submitted to a federal regulatory docket regarding medical payment products (medical credit cards and loans). These comments were submitted in response to a joint Request for Information (RFI) from the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB), Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), and Department of the Treasury.

The comments come from diverse stakeholders:
- Individual patients sharing personal experiences with medical cre

schema_name: Medical Payment Products Regulatory Analysis Schema
description: A comprehensive schema for analyzing public comments regarding medical credit cards and loans submitted to the CFPB, HHS, and Treasury RFI. Captures stakeholder perspectives, consumer harms, health equity, and policy recommendations.

categorical_fields.description: The primary identity and perspective of the commenter.
categorical_fields.hint: Classify based on the self-identification in the 'Title' or text body.

categorical_fields.description: Identification of specific demographic groups that may face unique risks or disparities.
categorical_fields.hint: Select all that apply if the commenter explicitly mentions these statuses.

categorical_fields.description: Specific negative outcomes or risks described by the commenter.
categorical_fields.hint: Focus on the tangible downstream impacts mentioned in the narrative.

categorical_fields.description: Specific regulatory or legislative actions suggested by the commenter.
categorical_fields.hint: Identify the 'asks' or solutions proposed for the agencies.

categorical_fields.description: Specific companies, banks, or product names identified in the text.
categorical_fields.hint: Useful for identifying the most frequently criticized or defended market participants.

scalar_fields.description: The degree of immediate action requested by the commenter.
scalar_fields.scale_interpretation: 0 = No concern/neutral, 5 = Moderate concern/request for review, 10 = Critical/emergency intervention needed.
scalar_fields.hint: Assess based on the presence of emotive language or calls for immediate bans.

scalar_fields.description: The severity of the consequences described in personal narratives.
scalar_fields.scale_interpretation: 0 = No impact/Theoretical, 5 = Significant financial stress, 10 = Total financial ruin/loss of housing/denial of life-saving care.
scalar_fields.hint: Look for the downstream outcomes like credit destruction or medical bankruptcy.

scalar_fields.description: Overall attitude toward medical payment products.
scalar_fields.scale_interpretation: 0 = Highly critical/predatory view, 5 = Neutral/mixed, 10 = Highly supportive/essential service view.
scalar_fields.hint: Financial companies will likely score 8-10, while victims will likely score 0-2.

key_quotes_fields.description: Snippets that capture the emotional core or the most significant evidence in the comment.
key_quotes_fields.hint: Prioritize quotes that illustrate the 'human' side of the financial impact.

key_quotes_fields.description: Direct quotes specifying what the commenter believes the CFPB/HHS should do.
key_quotes_fields.hint: Extract the most concise 'call to action' found in the document.
